description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mt32-pi CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow consists of two jobs: build and package. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, caches ARM toolchains, installs toolchains if not retrieved from cache, updates PATH, builds the kernel for multiple boards (pi2, pi3-64, pi4-64), and uploads the built kernel as an artifact. The package job depends on the build job, caches boot files, downloads the built kernel, and uploads an SD card archive. If a tag is pushed, it creates a release package and publishes a release with the package.
